title: Changelog
description: Auto-generated from git history. Updated on every push to main.

entries.message: Fix icon-cell CSS: fill not stroke for Carbon icons
Carbon icons in iconography section + fix bell alignment
Switch icon library to Carbon Design System (IBM) icons
Rebuild sidebar to match real design: white bg, blue icons, CSS hover expand
Add mobile & tablet variants to topbar JSON and renderer
Update sidebar section: 3 products × 3 states with real hp-sidebar dark theme
Add product logos: topbar variants, logo section grid, DT wordmark in header
Rebuild inputs section with real hp-text-field structure
Add modular design system: index.html, renderers, and sections data
Sincronization with current DT Honeypot repo 1.0
Initial commit: DT Design System v1
